zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Gordon於1290年出生時，她的父親Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon17歲，母親Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie20歲。她於大約1319年與Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡焦福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1376年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Gordon于1290年出生时，她的父亲Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon17岁，母亲Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie20岁。她于大约1319年与Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡焦福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1376年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Gordon was born in 1290, her father, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, was 17 and her mother, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, was 20. She married Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow about 1319, in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1376, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Gordon est née en 1290, son père, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow environ 1319, à Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1376, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Gordon 1290 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon 17 und ihre Mutter Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie 20. Sie hat um 1319 in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1376 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Gordon è nata il nel 1290, sua padre, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow circa 1319, nel Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1376, nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Gordonが1290年に生まれた時，父Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordonは17歳，母Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogieは20歳であった。約1319年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカドゾウでSir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1376年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Gordon(이)가 1290년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1319년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카드즈에서 Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1376년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Gordon nasceu em 1290, seu pai, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow aproximadamente 1319, em Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1376, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Gordon родилась в 1290 г., её отцу по имени Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow около 1319 г. в местности кадзоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1376 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Gordon nació en 1290, su papá, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Fitzgilbert de Hamilton 1st Lord Cadzow aproximadamente 1319, en Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1376, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años.
